text: 但是 在把肿瘤切除后 手术还没有完全结束 汤医生还得继续为Rosna重建肠道
traditional_chinese: 但是，在腫瘤切除後，手術還未完全結束，湯醫生还得繼續為Rosna重建腸道
English: However, after removing the tumor, the surgery was not completely over. Dr. Tang still had to continue reconstructing Rosna's intestines.
Vietnamese: Tuy nhiên, sau khi cắt bỏ khối u, ca phẫu thuật vẫn chưa kết thúc hoàn toàn. Bác sĩ Tang vẫn phải tiếp tục tái tạo đường ruột cho Rosna.
French: Cependant, après avoir retiré la tumeur, l'opération n'était pas complètement terminée. Dr Tang devait encore continuer à reconstruire les intestins de Rosna.
